member.name: T:GenerationArk.Simulation.Commands.AddCounterCommand
member.summary: Simple deterministic command used by the foundation test harness.

member.name: T:GenerationArk.Simulation.Core.SimulationFramePump
member.summary: Engine-independent frame accumulator. A Unity MonoBehaviour can delegate its unscaled frame delta to this type without allowing rendering time into gameplay logic.

member.name: T:GenerationArk.Simulation.State.WorldState
member.summary: Minimal deterministic state container for the first clock milestone. Gameplay-specific state will replace these counters in later milestones.
